violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 10/21/2025
Single service items were observed stored on the floor in the kitchen. Single service items must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 10/07/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the following has an accumulation of: 1) prep unit (food residue and other debris) 2) hoods (grease and soil residue) New Violation. Correct By: 10/21/2025

The door to the outside, located in the back entrance/exit area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 05/31/2024
The food prep sink in the back area was in poor repair (largely pitted). New Violation. Correct By: 05/31/2024
The ceiling in prep areas is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 05/31/2024
